ddls:
CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user that this profile belongs to */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department associated with the role */,
  "role_level" TEXT /* Level of the role (e.g., junior, senior, manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user that this role is assigned to */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role being assigned */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who assigned the role */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource the permission applies to (e.g., API, web application) */,
  "resource_id" TEXT /* ID of the specific resource the permission applies to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission assignment */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role that this permission is assigned to */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the permission being assigned */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who assigned the permission */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "login_history" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user that logged in */,
  "login_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user logged in */,
  "logout_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user logged out */,
  "login_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user logged in */,
  "login_device" TEXT /* Device used for login (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "login_location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "password_reset_tokens" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each password reset token */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user that this token belongs to */,
  "token" TEXT /* Password reset token */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the token expires */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the token */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the token was generated */,
  "used_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the token was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "auth_logs" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each authentication log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user that authenticated */,
  "auth_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user authenticated */,
  "auth_type" TEXT /* Type of authentication used (e.g., password, token) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the authentication attempt was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for the authentication attempt (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the authentication attempt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user that this session belongs to */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the session was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the session was updated */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., web, mobile) */,
  "session_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the session */,
  "session_device" TEXT /* Device used for the session (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "session_location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the log was created */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log (e.g., login, logout, create user) */,
  "log_data" TEXT /* Data associated with the log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user that performed the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for the action (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_reports" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was created */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data associated with the report */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was generated */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
